name: claude-books-hub
description: Series HUB landing for claude-books.brandon-behring.dev — the apex index page, a book-scaffold-astro consumer. Built onto the combined dist/ root by scripts/assemble-hub.mjs, above the four book workspaces. Uses the 'academic' profile ONLY because it is the scaffold's lone chrome-free profile (see astro.config.mjs) — not for academic semantics; that pulls the katex peer deps below.
